lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear and is in exceptional mechanical and cosmetic state. All components are in perfect working order.

The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and staining. Several mechanical systems are currently non-functional and require major repairs.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable ride! While it shows some honest signs of use and age, it remains a solid choice for anyone looking for a functional and budget-friendly vehicle. It’s been a reliable companion and is ready for its next chapter with you!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior shows some minor signs of wear, including a few small door dings and light surface scratches, but the paint still holds a nice shine. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine starts reliably and the transmission shifts smoothly, with all scheduled maintenance kept up to date. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors, though you will find some typical wear on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. It is a solid, dependable car that is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has some fading on the hood and roof, along with several noticeable door dings and scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean but the driver's seat shows significant bolster wear and the carpets are stained in the rear. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, but there is a slow oil leak from the valve cover gasket that will eventually need attention. The tires have about 40% tread remaining and the brakes are functional but may need pads within the next 5,000 miles. It is a solid choice for someone looking for functional transportation who doesn't mind some cosmetic and minor mechanical imperfections.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a distinguished balance of mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, the automobile exhibits consistent performance characteristics and a well-preserved interior. It stands as a premier selection for the professional seeking a dependable and sophisticated driving experience at an optimized value.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty ride, and I think you're going to love it! It's in really wonderful shape and has been so reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend getaways. It's super clean, runs smoothly, and honestly looks great parked in the driveway. I've taken great care of it, so it's ready to hit the road whenever you are. Come take it for a test drive—you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound driver’s example, powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six engine featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The chassis has been enhanced with rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed polyurethane bushings to maintain torsional rigidity. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock. Recent service includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and shim-and-bucket valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the valvetrain is within factory tolerances. It sits on staggered Style 67 wheels and retains excellent throttle response and lateral grip.
Well-maintained used car. Good condition. Clean title. All systems functional. Ready for immediate pickup.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between spirited performance and daily practicality. The exterior boasts a lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use consistent with its history. Inside, the cabin remains a serene environment; the upholstery is supple with minimal wear on the bolsters, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having benefited from a lifetime of prompt, documented maintenance. It shifts smoothly through all gears, brakes firmly without pulsation, and sits on a set of high-quality tires with significant tread remaining. This is a well-loved, turn-key example that offers a premium driving experience

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking mechanical excellence and aesthetic refinement. Thoroughly inspected and maintained to a rigorous standard, it delivers a dependable and sophisticated driving experience. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, this unit stands as a testament to quality automotive care and consistent performance.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic standards. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our professional benchmarks for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning buyer seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It is in really solid shape and has been well-loved and taken care of over the years. It's the perfect fit for someone looking for a reliable set of wheels that still looks great pulling into the driveway! I’ve truly enjoyed every mile in it, and I’m sure you will too. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) features the refined 3.6L M96 flat-six powerplant paired with a tactile G96 6-speed manual transaxle. The engine benefits from VarioCam Plus variable valve timing and lift, delivering linear torque across the rev range. This example has had the IMS bearing retrofitted with a dual-row ceramic solution and a fresh Rear Main Seal (RMS) for long-term mechanical reliability. The suspension retains its factory-spec McPherson struts and multi-link rear geometry, ensuring precise turn-in and high-speed stability. Finished in Arctic Silver over black leather, the chassis remains rigid with minor patina consistent with enthusiast use. Recent service includes a full cooling system refresh and
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance history. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Firm price.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear expected of a car that has been enjoyed responsibly. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of tears, while every button and feature operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule—the engine pulls strongly and the transmission shifts with precision. With fresh fluids and tires in great shape, this car is ready for its next chapter without needing immediate attention. It’s a reliable, eye-catching example that has been kept in a smoke-free, climate-controlled environment.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic preservation. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. It represents an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of luxury, durability, and long-term value.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional synthesis of engineering integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile stands as a testament to conscientious ownership. It remains in commendable condition, characterized by a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile, ready to provide a sophisticated driving experience to its next discerning owner.

Hey everyone! I’m so excited to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable companion and still has tons of life left in it! It’s in really solid shape, drives like a dream, and I’ve taken care of it. If you're looking for a great car that won't let you down, this is definitely the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox, the mechanical engagement is unparalleled. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the high-revving internals remain robust. The chassis maintains its composure with refreshed bushings and a factory-spec limited-slip differential providing excellent rotational feedback. While showing honest signs of use, the drivetrain is tight, and the hydraulic steering rack offers the tactile precision modern enthusiasts crave. A mechanically sound, driver-spec machine.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor cosmetic imperfections one would expect from a well-loved car of its age. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with plush, supportive seating and all electronic features—including the dual-zone climate control and premium sound system—functioning exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine purrs with consistent power, paired with a transmission that shifts seamlessly through every gear. We’ve recently completed a full fluid service and multi-point inspection to ensure it’s road-trip ready. This car offers a smooth, quiet ride and a level of reliability that makes it a standout choice for anyone seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle without the showroom price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a distinguished balance of performance and value. Representing a high standard for the pre-owned market, it features a well-preserved aesthetic and mechanical integrity that ensures a turnkey ownership experience. For the discerning individual who prioritizes reliability and professional presentation, this remains an exemplary choice.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been meticulously maintained to meet rigorous standards, ensuring a driving experience characterized by both reliability and consistent performance. A quintessential choice for the discerning professional seeking a premium pre-owned asset that balances value with excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting with my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in great shape and has been super well-loved, making it the perfect choice if you're looking for a dependable car that’s ready for its next big adventure! Everything runs smoothly, and I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have. Come check it out!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This unit demonstrates excellent compression across all cylinders, with the high-revving VANOS system recently serviced for optimal valve timing. The chassis remains rigid, benefiting from a proactive rear subframe reinforcement kit. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock, ensuring precise torque distribution. The suspension geometry is dialed in with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the car’s hallmark telepathic turn-in. While the exterior shows minor patina consistent with a well-loved driver, the powertrain and drivetrain are sorted for the enthusiast seeking a pure, analog driving experience.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. No major accidents.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and stands as a testament to careful ownership. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish with only minor signs of regular use, while the interior remains a pristine, smoke-free environment featuring supple upholstery and a suite of fully operational tech amenities. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; the engine pulls strong, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with recent updates including a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. With all service records accounted for and every feature functioning exactly as it should, this car represents a reliable and sophisticated choice for any driver looking for quality and peace of mind.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting with impressive mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. The exterior retains a sophisticated luster, complemented by a well-preserved interior that reflects diligent care. We invite you to experience the superior performance and lasting value of this distinguished automobile.
